scripts.dev: npm run build:core && concurrently -n core,sync,docs -c blue,yellow,green "npm -w @deadlock-ui/core run dev" "node scripts/watch-copy.mjs" "npm -w docs run start"
scripts.build: npm -w @deadlock-ui/core run build && npm -w @deadlock-ui/react -w @deadlock-ui/vue run build
scripts.docs: npm run build:core && npm -w docs run start
scripts.docs:build: npm run build:core && npm -w docs run build
